chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 4880 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For hearing of CMA No.21686/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 10th October 2024 Mr. Muhammad Din Qazi, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- Mr. Fahad Hussain, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondents No.2&3, which is taken on record. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceeding on the basis of impugned Order-in-Original dated 30.08.2024 initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner (Appeals-IV), Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner to decide the pending Appeal(s) of the Petitioner(s), to which learned counsel for the Respondents concedes. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals-IV), Sindh Revenue Board, Karachi to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
